name: Base Video Skin
description: Minimal base skin with essential styling for video players

classes.controlsBar: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm
classes.playButton: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer
classes.timeline: flex-1 h-1 bg-white/30 rounded-full cursor-pointer relative
classes.timelineProgress: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-blue-500 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.timelineBuffered: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-white/50 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.fullscreenButton: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer
classes.settingsButton: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer
classes.loadingSpinner: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50
classes.playOverlay: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/30 cursor-pointer hover:bg-black/40 transition-colors
